Sri Lanka Cricketers’ Pakistan Safety Fears Increase

Nov 13, 2025 • 8JJ Sports

Sri Lanka Cricketers’ Pakistan Safety Fears Increase

Several Sri Lankan cricketers have raised new safety concerns ahead of their Pakistan tour, citing recent reports of instability and intelligence alerts. The board is now evaluating additional security assurances before proceeding.
